title: polystichum lobatum var. discretum
intro: Polystichum lobatum var. discretum, also known as the variable-leaf polystichum fern, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this fern include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory tract irritations, and promoting overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Polystichum lobatum var. discretum typically involve drying and infusing the fronds in hot water or using them in decoctions to create teas and tonics for medicinal purposes.
